capability_checks.description: Attacker agent identifies at least one attack vector from the knowledge graph
capability_checks.expected_behavior: Transcript shows BSKG queries targeting access control, reentrancy, or value transfer patterns before proposing attack vectors

capability_checks.description: Attacker constructs a concrete exploit path with ordered function call sequence
capability_checks.expected_behavior: Output contains an exploit_path or attack_sequence with at least 2 steps referencing contract functions

capability_checks.description: Every attack vector references specific graph node IDs as evidence
capability_checks.expected_behavior: Each attack vector in output has non-empty graph_node_ids[] linking to BSKG nodes

capability_checks.description: Attacker evaluates the economic impact or severity of each identified vulnerability
capability_checks.expected_behavior: Findings include severity classification and reasoning about financial impact

evidence_requirements.description: BSKG node IDs referenced in attack vectors
Contract function locations in exploit paths
